note: Full $50-increment step-function chart (580 rows, $50-$30,000 combined gross monthly income), transcribed directly from the official Arkansas Judiciary child support calculator source code (ChildSupp.js, Arkansas Supreme Court Administrative Order 10). Arkansas explicitly rounds DOWN to the previous chart row rather than interpolating between rows (per a code comment: interpolation was implemented then abandoned once informed that incomes are rounded down to the previous row amount) -- a true step lookup, not a sparse-anchor interpolation.
